calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-22-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deb Fox, via Zoom, for Jeannie Mason, Trustee.

Ms. Fox reports regarding her attempts to properly serve EQ Shareholder Services via mail, with signature of acknowledgement, and via fax. After additional discussion regarding Ms. Fox' attempts to personally serve EQ Shareholder Services, the court excuses the absence of personal service.

The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Obitinalla. Not reported.
